results.description: Colocated #[cfg(test)] blocks only permitted when testing private methods
Integration tests must not use mocking libraries or mock types
Sibling files sharing a common prefix must be grouped into a subdirectory module (e.g., check_runner.rs + check_result.rs → check/runner.rs + check/result.rs)

violations.message: 2 files in main/src/api/types/validator/ share prefix 'http': http_config_validator, http_egress_object — group into main/src/api/types/validator/http/
violations.fix_hint: Create a subdirectory named after the shared prefix and move files into it (e.g., `check_runner.rs` → `check/runner.rs`)

violations.message: 2 files in main/src/api/error/ share prefix 'http': http_egress_build_error, http_egress_error — group into main/src/api/error/http/
violations.fix_hint: Create a subdirectory named after the shared prefix and move files into it (e.g., `check_runner.rs` → `check/runner.rs`)

violations.message: 11 files in main/src/api/types/ share prefix 'http': http_auth, http_body, http_config, http_config_builder, http_egress_result, http_method, http_request, http_request_builder, http_response, http_stream_response, http_transport_svc — group into main/src/api/types/http/
violations.actual: http_auth, http_body, http_config, http_config_builder, http_egress_result, http_method, http_request, http_request_builder, http_response, http_stream_response, http_transport_svc
violations.fix_hint: Create a subdirectory named after the shared prefix and move files into it (e.g., `check_runner.rs` → `check/runner.rs`)

violations.message: 2 files in main/src/api/traits/ share prefix 'http': http_egress, http_stream — group into main/src/api/traits/http/
violations.fix_hint: Create a subdirectory named after the shared prefix and move files into it (e.g., `check_runner.rs` → `check/runner.rs`)

results.description: Every {implementation_layer}/ submodule must have a corresponding {interface_layer}/ submodule defining its types or traits

violations.message: main\src\core\default has no corresponding api interface counterpart
violations.fix_hint: Create 'main\src\api\default' with type/trait definitions that main\src\core\default implements against

violations.fix_hint: Create 'main\src\api\metrics' with type/trait definitions that main\src\core\metrics implements against

violations.fix_hint: Create 'main\src\api\validator' with type/trait definitions that main\src\core\validator implements against

violations.fix_hint: Create 'main\src\api\validator\http_config_validator.rs' with type/trait definitions that main\src\core\validator\http_config_validator.rs implements against

results.description: saf/ must not re-export traits via pub use — wrap trait methods as standalone functions instead

violations.fix_hint: Remove `pub use` of traits from saf/; instead, add standalone pub fn wrappers that call the trait impl internally

results.description: api/ root must not contain loose .rs files or mixed-layout directories — only mod.rs at root; no flat traits/types/error/ dirs when domain-grouped layout (api/<domain>/traits/) is active
Source files must not suppress the dead_code lint via #[allow(dead_code)]
